concept: A build provenance chain crossing an approval checkpoint
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, a provenance chain of commit-like blocks crossing a narrow approval checkpoint into a sealed build, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: A provenance chain crossing an approval checkpoint into a sealed build
cropNotes: Keep the approval checkpoint central and avoid recognizable vendor interface motifs

concept: A least-privilege tool path with one approval gate
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, several abstract tool paths with only one narrow permitted route crossing a human approval gate, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: One permitted tool path crossing an approval gate while others remain closed
cropNotes: Keep the permitted path and approval gate central; no hand or person imagery

concept: A signed evidence plane bound to the check that produced it
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, a scanner beam producing a translucent evidence receipt bound to one inspected subject, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: A scanner beam producing an evidence receipt for one inspected subject
cropNotes: Keep beam, subject, and receipt inside the central safe area

concept: Evidence, coverage, and limitations assembled into one report structure
prompt: Text-free square cinematic technical artwork, separate evidence receipts and coverage planes assembling into a restrained report-like structure with an open limitation edge, matte graphite geometry, translucent evidence planes, deep navy atmosphere, restrained cyan green amber and red signals, controlled depth, sparse haze, meaningful subject protected inside the central 60 percent, no people, no logos, no dashboards, no words, no letters, no numbers
alt: Evidence receipts and coverage planes assembling into a report structure

concept: A reviewed change set tied to one immutable artifact
